articles.title: First Time Using SorryCode
articles.summary: First time using SorryCode? Learn how SorryCode connects Codex, Claude Code, Skills, and models, then choose the right next step for your goal.

articles.title: 第一次使用 SorryCode
articles.summary: 第一次使用 SorryCode，先理解它能帮你把 Codex、Claude Code、Skills 和模型接起来，再按目标选择下一步。

articles.title: Create API Key
articles.summary: Understand what an API key is, then create an sk-... key in the SorryCode console for Codex, Claude Code, or Skills.

articles.title: 创建 API Key
articles.summary: 先理解 API Key 是什么，再在 SorryCode 控制台创建一个 sk-... 给 Codex、Claude Code 或 Skills 使用。

articles.title: Runtimes and Models
articles.summary: Understand Codex, Claude Code, protocols, and models so you do not connect a model to the wrong runtime and waste API usage.

articles.title: 工具与模型
articles.summary: 分清 Codex、Claude Code、协议和模型，避免把模型接到不合适的工具里，造成缓存差和 API 量浪费。

articles.title: First Request
articles.summary: Use one minimal request to validate the API key, Base URL, and network path. This page is a manual-path and troubleshooting reference, not the default beginner entry.

articles.title: 首条请求
articles.summary: 用最小请求验证 API Key、Base URL 和网络链路都可用。它是手动安装和排障参考，不是新手默认入口。

articles.title: Image Requests
articles.summary: Use /v1/images/generations or /v1/images/edits for OpenAI-compatible image models, including gpt-image-2 and Gemini image models.

articles.title: 图像请求
articles.summary: 用 /v1/images/generations 或 /v1/images/edits 调用 OpenAI-compatible 图片模型，包括 gpt-image-2 和 Gemini 图片模型。

articles.title: Codex
articles.summary: Understand Codex first, prepare your API key, finish one-click install, and start using it right away.

articles.title: Codex
articles.summary: 先认识 Codex，再准备 API Key，完成一键安装，然后直接开始用。

articles.title: Codex App Plugin Setup
articles.summary: Manually configure ~/.codex/config.toml when the Codex App plugin entry is grey, or /plugins cannot find Chrome, Computer Use, Browser, or HyperFrames.

articles.title: Codex App 插件配置
articles.summary: Codex App 插件入口灰了，或 /plugins 找不到 Chrome、Computer Use、Browser、HyperFrames 时，手动配置 ~/.codex/config.toml。

articles.title: Claude Code
articles.summary: Understand Claude Code first, prepare your API key, finish one-click install, and start using it right away.

articles.title: Claude Code
articles.summary: 先认识 Claude Code，再准备 API Key，完成一键安装，然后直接开始用。

articles.title: OpenClaw
articles.summary: Connect OpenClaw to SorryCode through its custom API path. Install the CLI first, then write the Base URL, model, and API key in one pass.

articles.title: OpenClaw
articles.summary: 用 OpenClaw 的自定义 API 路径把它接到 SorryCode，先装 CLI，再把 Base URL、模型和 API Key 一次写进去。

articles.title: Hermes Agent
articles.summary: Connect Hermes Agent to SorryCode through the custom endpoint path. Use the official install flow on macOS or Linux, and follow the upstream WSL2 route on Windows.

articles.title: Hermes Agent
articles.summary: 用 Hermes Agent 的 Custom endpoint 把它接到 SorryCode。macOS / Linux 直接走官方安装，Windows 当前按 WSL2 主路径处理。

articles.title: Creation and Design
articles.summary: The entry point for images, posters, one-pagers, resumes, reports, portfolios, and presentation work.

articles.title: 创作与设计
articles.summary: 图片、海报、一页纸、简历、报告、作品集和演示表达的入口。先判断你要生成图片、处理内容，还是做 PPT / slides。

articles.title: What Are Skills
articles.summary: A skill is an instruction manual for the agent. After installing Codex or Claude Code, use skills to make image work, document design, slides, project reading, and engineering workflows more reliable.

articles.title: Skills 是什么
articles.summary: Skill 是给 agent 读的操作说明书。装好 Codex 或 Claude Code 后，用 Skills 让 agent 稳定完成图片、排版、PPT、读项目和工程流程。

articles.title: Office Docs
articles.summary: The entry point for existing Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and PDF files. For new polished artifacts, go to Creation and Design.

articles.title: 办公文档
articles.summary: Word、Excel、PowerPoint、PDF 这类已有办公文件的处理入口。想从零做成品，请去创作与设计。

articles.title: Waza
articles.summary: A full engineering-habits skill pack. Use it to think before building, debug by root cause, design with direction, learn from sources, write naturally, and check before shipping.

articles.title: Waza
articles.summary: 一整套工程习惯包。让你在做功能、查 bug、写界面、读资料、改文案、提交前检查时，都有更稳的协作路径。

articles.title: DBSkill
articles.summary: A business diagnosis and content decision toolkit by dontbesilent. Use it to diagnose business questions, find benchmarks, review content direction, improve hooks and titles, and inspect execution blocks.

articles.title: DBSkill
articles.summary: dontbesilent 的商业诊断与内容决策工具箱。帮你判断商业问题、找对标、做内容诊断、优化开头标题，也能处理执行力和概念混乱。

articles.title: DOCX
articles.summary: A skill for Word documents: reading, editing, preserving formatting, comments, and tracked changes.

articles.title: DOCX
articles.summary: 处理 Word 文档的 skill。适合读取、编辑、保留格式、处理批注和修订。

articles.title: SorryCode Image2
articles.summary: Generate or edit covers, posters, illustrations, and content assets with SorryCode Images API; supports gpt-image-2 and enabled Gemini image models.

articles.title: SorryCode Image2
articles.summary: 用 SorryCode Images API 生成或编辑封面、海报、插图和内容素材；支持 gpt-image-2 和已开放的 Gemini 图片模型。

articles.title: Kami
articles.summary: A design-focused skill for finished documents. Use it for one-pagers, long docs, resumes, portfolios, and slide decks.

articles.title: Kami
articles.summary: 一个面向成品文档的设计型 skill。适合做一页纸、长文、简历、作品集，也适合直接做演讲幻灯片。

articles.title: XLSX
articles.summary: A skill for Excel workbooks: data cleaning, formulas, charts, analysis, and reporting.

articles.title: XLSX
articles.summary: 处理 Excel 表格的 skill。适合数据清洗、公式、图表、经营分析和报表整理。

articles.title: Guizang PPT Skill
articles.summary: An evolving presentation-making skill for agent-built single-file HTML decks, visual systems, deck images, and platform covers.

articles.title: 藏师傅的 PPT Skill
articles.summary: 一个持续进化的 PPT 制作 skill。适合用 agent 生成有明确设计系统的单文件 HTML 演示，也能承接配图和平台封面。

articles.title: PPTX
articles.summary: A skill for native PowerPoint files: editing existing decks, using templates, and preparing reports or pitch decks.

articles.title: PPTX
articles.summary: 处理 PowerPoint 原生文件的 skill。适合修改已有 PPT、套模板、整理汇报材料和路演稿。

articles.title: Huashu Design
articles.summary: A third-party design skill for app prototypes, HTML/PPT decks, motion design, infographics, variations, and critique. Free for personal use; commercial use requires authorization.

articles.title: Huashu Design
articles.summary: 第三方设计 skill。适合 App 原型、HTML/PPT、动效、信息图、设计变体和专家评审；个人使用免费，商业使用需授权。

articles.title: PDF
articles.summary: A skill for PDFs: reading, extracting text and tables, splitting, merging, filling forms, and organizing material.

articles.title: PDF
articles.summary: 处理 PDF 的 skill。适合读取、提取文字和表格、拆分合并、填表和整理资料。

articles.title: How to Use Design Skills
articles.summary: Design, decks, images, and writing usually need iteration. Use skills to create an editable first draft, then guide the agent with specific feedback.

articles.title: 设计类 Skills 怎么用
articles.summary: 设计、PPT、图片和写作这类产物通常需要迭代。用 skill 先得到可修改的初稿，再通过具体反馈逐步靠近你要的结果。

articles.title: Organize a Long Article
articles.summary: Use Kami to turn notes, interviews, drafts, or research material into a structured long document.

articles.title: 整理一篇长文章
articles.summary: 用 Kami 把笔记、访谈、草稿或研究资料整理成正式长文档。

articles.title: Understand One-pagers
articles.summary: A one-pager is a finished one-page artifact that explains one thing clearly.

articles.title: 认识 One-pager
articles.summary: One-pager 是一页就能讲清楚一件事的成品材料。

articles.title: Understand a Project
articles.summary: Ask your installed AI workbench to read the project structure first and explain where to start.

articles.title: 读懂一个项目
articles.summary: 让你已经安装的 AI 工作台先阅读项目结构，告诉你入口、模块和应该先看的文件。

articles.title: Make a Sharing Deck
articles.summary: For your first sharing deck, use Guizang PPT Skill to create a browser-ready web presentation.

articles.title: 做一套分享 PPT
articles.summary: 第一次做分享 PPT，先用藏师傅的 PPT Skill 生成一套能在浏览器里打开的网页演示。

articles.title: Edit Your First File
articles.summary: Ask your AI workbench for a plan first, then let it safely edit one small file.

articles.title: 修改第一个文件
articles.summary: 让 AI 工作台先给计划，再安全修改一个小文件。

articles.title: Generate Your First Image
articles.summary: Install the SorryCode Image2 skill first, then generate your first cover, poster, or illustration with gpt-image-2.

articles.title: 生成第一张图片
articles.summary: 先安装 SorryCode Image2 skill，再用 gpt-image-2 生成第一张封面、海报或插图。

articles.title: Create a Product Intro
articles.summary: Use Kami to turn product information into a one-page artifact you can share.

articles.title: 做一份产品介绍
articles.summary: 用 Kami 把产品信息整理成一页能发给别人的 One-pager。

articles.title: Create a Personal Intro
articles.summary: Use Kami to create a one-page intro that explains who you are and why people should contact you.

articles.title: 做一份个人介绍
articles.summary: 用 Kami 做一页个人介绍，讲清你是谁、做什么、别人为什么找你。

articles.title: CC-Switch
articles.summary: An advanced config-switching tool for graphical endpoint, API key, and multi-runtime configuration management.

articles.title: CC-Switch
articles.summary: 进阶配置切换工具。适合需要图形化管理 endpoint、API Key 和多 runtime 配置的人。

articles.title: Mole
articles.summary: A local Mac maintenance tool. Start by seeing where disk space went, then preview cleanup for dev caches, installers, app leftovers, and temporary files.

articles.title: Mole
articles.summary: 一个 Mac 本地维护工具。先看清空间被什么占用，再安全预览清理开发缓存、安装包、App 残留和临时文件。

articles.title: VS Code
articles.summary: An optional visual project workspace. Open folders, inspect files and diffs, and install Codex / Claude Code extensions when needed.

articles.title: VS Code
articles.summary: 一个可选的可视化项目工作台。用它打开项目、查看文件和改动，并按需安装 Codex / Claude Code 插件。

articles.title: Open Design
articles.summary: An open-source design workbench that combines local agent CLIs, skills, DESIGN.md design systems, and artifact preview.

articles.title: Open Design
articles.summary: 一个开源设计工作台。把本地 agent CLI、Skills、DESIGN.md 设计系统和 artifact preview 组织成完整设计生产链路。

articles.title: Open Slide
articles.summary: A tool for creating React slide decks with Codex or Claude Code. Useful for code-based decks, comments, presentation mode, and HTML/PDF export.

articles.title: Open Slide
articles.summary: 用 Codex 或 Claude Code 写 React 幻灯片的工具。适合代码式 deck、评论修改、演讲预览和 HTML/PDF 导出。

articles.title: HyperFrames
articles.summary: A toolchain for writing HTML video compositions with agents, then previewing and rendering them as MP4. Useful for product videos, launch motion, intros, and social clips.

articles.title: HyperFrames
articles.summary: 用 agent 写 HTML 视频 composition，再预览和渲染成 MP4 的工具链。适合产品短视频、发布动效、课程片头和社媒视频。

articles.title: What to do when old Codex sessions disappear after switching providers
articles.summary: Use codex-history to find local Codex sessions and resume the right one.

articles.title: Codex 换 provider 后，旧 session 找不到了怎么办
articles.summary: 用 codex-history 找回本机 Codex 历史 session，并继续 resume。

articles.title: What Is Agent Infrastructure
articles.summary: A map for runtimes, context files, protocols, and skills.

articles.title: Agent 基建是什么
articles.summary: 用一张地图理解 runtime、上下文文件、协议和 skills 的关系。

articles.title: AGENTS.md
articles.summary: Project instructions read by Codex. Use it for project structure, test commands, code style, and working constraints.

articles.title: AGENTS.md
articles.summary: Codex 读取的项目指令文件。适合写项目结构、测试命令、代码规范和工作约束。

articles.title: CLAUDE.md
articles.summary: Memory and instruction file read by Claude Code. Use it for project context, common commands, and long-lived collaboration rules.

articles.title: CLAUDE.md
articles.summary: Claude Code 读取的 memory / instruction 文件。适合写项目背景、常用命令和长期协作规则。

articles.title: What Is DESIGN.md
articles.summary: DESIGN.md is a design context file for agents. It captures product goals, brand principles, design tokens, components, layout rules, and things to avoid.

articles.title: DESIGN.md 是什么
articles.summary: DESIGN.md 是设计 agent 的上下文文件。它把产品目标、品牌原则、设计 tokens、组件、布局和禁用规则写成可复用标准。

articles.title: MCP
articles.summary: Model Context Protocol, an open protocol for connecting agents to tools, data, and services.

articles.title: MCP
articles.summary: Model Context Protocol，让 agent 连接外部工具、数据和服务的开放协议。

articles.title: Skills
articles.summary: Skills are installable, reusable capability packs for agents. They use SKILL.md, references, scripts, and assets to hand workflows to agents.

articles.title: Skills
articles.summary: Skills 是 agent 可安装、可复用的能力包。它用 SKILL.md、参考资料、脚本和资产把工作流交给 agent。

articles.title: Node.js
articles.summary: Shared environment troubleshooting for macOS and Windows. Use it for manual setup or when one-click install gets blocked.

articles.title: Node.js
articles.summary: macOS / Windows 的共享环境排障页。主要服务手动安装和一键安装失败后的环境定位。

articles.title: Windows PowerShell
articles.summary: The Windows terminal entry for SorryCode one-click install: how to open it, paste commands, and avoid shell or encoding mistakes.

articles.title: Windows PowerShell
articles.summary: Windows 用户运行 SorryCode 一键安装时的终端入口：怎么打开、粘贴命令、避免混用 shell 和编码问题。

articles.title: Common Questions
articles.summary: The shortest fix path by error code and symptom.

articles.title: 常见问题
articles.summary: 按错误码和现象给出最短修复路径。
